mano_cua.result_summary: Export SVG 按钮点击后成功下载 graph.svg 文件，浏览器控制台无任何 JavaScript 错误

This confirms: 1. The Export SVG button was found on the page 2. Clicking the button triggered the download of a file named graph.svg 3. The file came from http://localhost:3000 4. The console showed No errors - no JavaScript errors occurred.
